name: Ubiquiti UniFi Phone Touch
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Phone Touch
short_description: Ubiquiti UniFi Phone Touch (UTP-Touch) is a versatile desktop smartphone with a 5-inch HD multi-touch display, PoE support, octa-core processor, 2 GB RAM, and 32 GB storage.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Phone Touch (UTP-Touch) is a versatile, user-friendly desktop smartphone designed to improve business communications with advanced features and ease of use. Equipped with a 5-inch HD multi-touch display and a sleek ergonomic design, this phone enhances the calling experience while reducing the learning curve typically associated with complex office devices. The 720 x 1280 HD resolution ensures crisp visuals, while the fingerprint-resistant coating keeps the screen looking pristine throughout the day. With PoE (Power over Ethernet) support, setup is streamlined and requires minimal cabling. Powered by an octa-core ARM® Cortex® A53 processor and with 2 GB of RAM, the UniFi Phone Touch handles multitasking and demanding communication needs effortlessly. Two Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) RJ45 ports offer rapid and stable network connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Desktop Smartphone
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Phone Touch (UTP-Touch) is a versatile, user-friendly desktop smartphone designed to improve business communications with advanced features and ease of use. Equipped with a 5-inch HD multi-touch display and a sleek ergonomic design, this phone enhances the calling experience while reducing the learning curve typically associated with complex office devices. The 720 x 1280 HD resolution ensures crisp visuals, while the fingerprint-resistant coating keeps the screen looking pristine throughout the day. With PoE (Power over Ethernet) support, setup is streamlined and requires minimal cabling. Powered by an octa-core ARM® Cortex® A53 processor and with 2 GB of RAM, the UniFi Phone Touch handles multitasking and demanding communication needs effortlessly. Two Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) RJ45 ports offer rapid and stable network connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Functionality
detailed_description.text: The UTP-Touch features Bluetooth 4.2 support for seamless pairing with mobile devices, headsets, or additional accessories. Whether you prefer using a speakerphone or taking calls privately with the ergonomic handset, this phone adapts to your needs. The built-in hands-free speaker delivers clear audio with a nominal power of 2W, ensuring crisp sound during conversations. Additionally, dual omnidirectional MEMS microphones on the hands-free option ensure superior sound capture, making sure you’re heard clearly in any setting. The 32 GB storage ensures you can keep essential information and contacts at your fingertips. This device also supports 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac WiFi for additional wireless flexibility, enabling optimal performance no matter the environment.

detailed_description.heading: Stylish and Durable Design
detailed_description.text: With a plastic enclosure and an aluminum base, the UniFi Phone Touch is both lightweight and durable, providing a professional look that complements modern office aesthetics. The device’s 5-inch display and multi-touch screen technology are designed for maximum ease of use, while the handset's omnidirectional electret microphone ensures clear communication during traditional handset calls. The phone's mute button on the ergonomic handset ensures that users can quickly manage calls in busy environments. The Ubiquiti UniFi Phone Touch is the ideal solution for businesses seeking a professional, high-performance desk phone with modern features, seamless connectivity, and excellent usability.
